description: Concept and area registry for CSOD LMS analytics — drives question decomposition, concept selection, and LLM-scored area ranking for analysis scoping

domain_registry.label: Assessment & Q&A
domain_registry.description: Knowledge checks, certification assessments, question banks, and evaluation instruments

domain_registry.label: Learning & Training
domain_registry.description: All learning activity, assignments, completions, catalog, modalities, and cost tracking

area_registry.label: Assessment & Q&A
area_registry.description: Cornerstone OnDemand assessment tests, results, evaluations, and Q&A (questions, answers, containers) for knowledge checks and certifications

area_registry.label: Assignments (LAT)
area_registry.description: Cornerstone OnDemand learning assignments (LAT), assignment details, user assignments, requirement tags, and availability for mandatory training and compliance tracking

area_registry.label: Curriculum & Bundles
area_registry.description: Cornerstone OnDemand training bundles, curriculum structure, and due date types for certification and learning path tracking

area_registry.label: ILT (Event-Session)
area_registry.description: Cornerstone OnDemand instructor-led training sessions, facilities, instructors, attendance, and event management for ILT cost and utilization analytics

area_registry.label: SCORM
area_registry.description: Cornerstone OnDemand SCORM eLearning content, sessions, subsessions, interactions, and activity history for learning effectiveness and engagement analytics

area_registry.label: Training Catalog (LO)
area_registry.description: Cornerstone OnDemand training catalog, learning objects, course types, providers, subjects, relationships, and ratings for training analytics and KPI recommendations

area_registry.label: Training Finance-E-Commerce
area_registry.description: Cornerstone OnDemand training purchases, line items, payers, payment types, licenses, and purchaser overrides for training ROI and cost analytics

area_registry.label: Training Models
area_registry.description: Cornerstone OnDemand training models, localized model info, and model-training object mapping for learning path and curriculum analytics

area_registry.label: Transcript & Statuses
area_registry.description: Cornerstone OnDemand training transcripts, assignments, statuses, delivery methods, and action reasons for completion tracking, compliance, and overdue analytics

concept_registry.label: Compliance & Mandatory Training
concept_registry.description: Track mandatory training obligations, overdue learners, regulatory deadlines, and requirement fulfilment across the organisation
sample_questions: Which learners are overdue on mandatory compliance training?
What is our organisation's compliance completion rate this quarter?
Show me all required training assignments with due dates past
Which departments have the lowest compliance completion rates?
How many employees haven't completed their annual compliance courses?

concept_registry.label: Assessment & Test Performance
concept_registry.description: Analyse test scores, pass/fail rates, question-level performance, evaluation results, and knowledge check effectiveness
sample_questions: What is the average assessment score by course?
Which questions have the highest failure rate?
Show pass/fail rates for certification assessments this month
How do pre-training vs post-training evaluation scores compare?
Which learners have failed an assessment more than twice?

concept_registry.label: Learning Completion & Status
concept_registry.description: Completion rates, transcript statuses, progress tracking, and learning activity across all training modalities
sample_questions: What is the overall training completion rate by department?
Show me learners who started but did not complete a course
How long does it take learners to complete training on average?
Which courses have the lowest completion rates?
Show transcript status distribution for the past 6 months

concept_registry.label: Curriculum & Learning Path Coverage
concept_registry.description: Structure of learning paths, curriculum hierarchies, bundle contents, and due date configurations for learning programmes
sample_questions: Which curriculum bundles are assigned to new hire onboarding?
Show me all courses in the leadership development curriculum
What is the coverage of the compliance curriculum by learner group?
List all training bundles and the courses they contain
Which learners have completed every item in a curriculum path?

concept_registry.label: Instructor-Led Training (ILT) & Attendance
concept_registry.description: Session scheduling, registration numbers, attendance, instructor assignments, facility utilisation, and waitlist management for live training
sample_questions: What is the average attendance rate for ILT sessions?
Which sessions had the highest no-show rates last quarter?
Show me instructor utilisation across all ILT sessions
Which facilities are most frequently used for training?
How many learners are waitlisted for upcoming ILT sessions?

concept_registry.label: eLearning & SCORM Engagement
concept_registry.description: SCORM module interactions, subsession activity, interaction-level analytics, and eLearning engagement depth
sample_questions: Which SCORM modules have the lowest completion rates?
How much time do learners spend per eLearning module on average?
Show interaction-level data for a specific online course
Which learners abandon SCORM courses before completion?
Compare eLearning engagement before and after a content update

concept_registry.label: Training Catalog & Content Inventory
concept_registry.description: Training object types, active content inventory, subjects, providers, ratings, equivalencies, and training model definitions
sample_questions: How many active courses exist in the training catalog by type?
Which training providers supply the most content?
Show me all courses grouped by subject area
What is the average course rating by content type?
Which courses have equivalencies that could reduce training burden?

concept_registry.label: Training Finance & Cost Tracking
concept_registry.description: Training purchases, payment types, license usage, billing accounts, and per-learner or per-course cost analysis
sample_questions: What is the total spend on external training this year?
Show me training purchase history by department
Which courses generate the most revenue from registrations?
How many training licenses have been purchased vs consumed?
What is the average cost per learner for each training type?

concept_registry.label: Enrollment & Training Availability
concept_registry.description: Who is eligible for which training, availability by organisational unit, user-level access rules, and requirement tag scoping
sample_questions: Which training courses are available to employees in a specific OU?
Show me learners who are eligible but have not yet enrolled
Which assignments have been targeted to which user groups?
What training is available to contractors vs full-time employees?
Show me the OU-to-training availability matrix

concept_registry.label: Individual Learner Progress & History
concept_registry.description: Per-learner training history, transcript timelines, learning velocity, assignment adherence, and holistic learner journey analytics
sample_questions: Show me the full training history for a specific employee
Which learners have the most active training in progress?
How has a learner's training activity changed over the past year?
Show me learners who consistently complete training ahead of deadline
Compare training activity between new hires and tenured employees

score_semantics.5: Directly addresses the question — primary tables required
score_semantics.4: Strongly relevant — provides key supporting context
score_semantics.3: Moderately relevant — useful for enrichment or joins
score_semantics.1: Low relevance — may be worth exploring but unlikely to be core

scoring_config.scoring_prompt_template: You are an expert CSOD LMS data analyst. A user asked: '{user_question}'. Score each of the following data areas from 1–5 based on how directly they are needed to answer the question. Return only JSON: {area_id: score}. Areas: {area_summaries}. Return at most {max_areas} areas with score >= 3.
scoring_config.concept_decomposition_prompt_template: You are an expert learning analytics analyst. A user asked: '{user_question}'. From the following concept list, identify which concepts are relevant to answering this question. Return JSON: {matched_concepts: [concept_id], reasoning: string}. Concepts: {concept_summaries}
